creator: rfarmer@predatorlabs.net
text:
Thanks for the feedback everyone.

I've updated my patch to refer to Chris' version of skinlf and to
include his patch for getmemory.c. Same URL.

If there is work ongoing to fix Scilab 4 I think it would be a good
idea to leave it in the tree - people may not need all the Java stuff
in the new version, plus it leaves a working version for platforms
where we don't have Java available.

Sorry about submitting duplicate PR's for a couple of the dependencies
- if Chris or anyone else wants to take maintainership for any of the
new ports, that's ok with me.

If people are interested in helping, some things to do, I think, are:
* Runtime testing (I'm not very familiar with Scilab/Matlab, so I
didn't do anything complex)
* Test other places than CURRENT, particularly if it works on 6.X with
the old GCC
* Try to figure out why the Ocaml components don't build (I don't know
Ocaml and I got errors I didn't understand so I just added
--without-ocaml to the configure args)
* Perhaps adding MatIO to the tree for Matlab compatibility
(http://sourceforge.net/projects/matio/)

-- 
Rob Farmer
